news.t: Fidelity® Launches Two Fixed Income ETFs, Expanding Lineup for Investors and Advisors

overview.description: The Fidelity Municipal Bond Opportunities ETF (FMUB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides municipal bond exposure of any maturity and credit quality. The fund seeks income that is exempt from federal income tax FMUB was launched on Apr 7, 2025 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Fidelity® Launches Two Fixed Income ETFs, Expanding Lineup for Investors and Advisors
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fidelity announced the launch of two fixed income ETFs: Fidelity Municipal Bond Opportunities ETF and Fidelity Systematic Municipal Bond Index ETF.
